modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble adding organizations in 25Live system

full_description_text:  
User trying to add organizations in 25Live. It not working as expected. Need help with this issue.
description: User trying to add organizations in 25Live. It not working as expected. Need help with this issue.
